text.content: ANNOUNCING A NEW PARTNERSHIP BETWEEN MAXAM TIRE & GRUPO SOLEDAD

rich_text.plain_text: ANNOUNCING A NEW PARTNERSHIP BETWEEN MAXAM TIRE & GRUPO SOLEDAD

text.content: A distribution agreement has been reached for the Iberian Peninsula

rich_text.plain_text: A distribution agreement has been reached for the Iberian Peninsula

text.content:
[Danvers, Massachusetts,
December 1st, 2019] Effective December 1st,
MAXAM Tire is pleased to
announce Grupo Soledad will be the official distributor for MAXAM Tire products
in Spain and Portugal.

rich_text.plain_text:
[Danvers, Massachusetts,
December 1st, 2019] Effective December 1st,
MAXAM Tire is pleased to
announce Grupo Soledad will be the official distributor for MAXAM Tire products
in Spain and Portugal.

text.content:
Grupo
Soledad and MAXAM Tire share two core values; providing the highest level of
quality customer experience and providing business solutions for their
customers. These values played a key role in MAXAM choosing Grupo Soledad as
the sole distributor for MAXAM’s OTR, Agricultural, Industrial, Construction
and Forestry tire series for both Iberian markets.

rich_text.plain_text:
Grupo
Soledad and MAXAM Tire share two core values; providing the highest level of
quality customer experience and providing business solutions for their
customers. These values played a key role in MAXAM choosing Grupo Soledad as
the sole distributor for MAXAM’s OTR, Agricultural, Industrial, Construction
and Forestry tire series for both Iberian markets.

text.content:
Technical expertise
is one of Grupo Soledad’s strengths.  MAXAM
believes that their knowledge of the product range will lead to a successful
partnership in distribution, advise and follow up on the best choice of MAXAM
products for their customer’s specific applications.

rich_text.plain_text:
Technical expertise
is one of Grupo Soledad’s strengths.  MAXAM
believes that their knowledge of the product range will lead to a successful
partnership in distribution, advise and follow up on the best choice of MAXAM
products for their customer’s specific applications.

text.content:
“Grupo Soledad
was already the distributor for MAXAM Tire in the Portuguese market.  They have been doing a great job with significant
growth in the last 2 years for the MAXAM brand. Grupo Soledad was the logical choice
for partnership and we expect that the efforts from each party will result in
significant growth in the Spanish market in both sales and brand recognition of
MAXAM Tire.” says Filipe Brito, MAXAM’s manager for the Iberian market.

rich_text.plain_text:
“Grupo Soledad
was already the distributor for MAXAM Tire in the Portuguese market.  They have been doing a great job with significant
growth in the last 2 years for the MAXAM brand. Grupo Soledad was the logical choice
for partnership and we expect that the efforts from each party will result in
significant growth in the Spanish market in both sales and brand recognition of
MAXAM Tire.” says Filipe Brito, MAXAM’s manager for the Iberian market.

text.content: The full range of MAXAM’s tires are currently available in Grupo Soledad warehouses throughout Spain and Portugal, which allows for delivery of MAXAM’s high-quality products within 48 hours.

rich_text.plain_text: The full range of MAXAM’s tires are currently available in Grupo Soledad warehouses throughout Spain and Portugal, which allows for delivery of MAXAM’s high-quality products within 48 hours.

text.content:
Several
events will be announced which will take place throughout Spain and Portugal to
celebrate this new partnership with Grupo Soledad, MAXAM and their associates.
